ogTitle: Medindie vs Medindie Gardens: Climate Safety

heading: Medindie vs Medindie Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Medindie, South Australia and Medindie Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Medindie Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Medindie (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Medindie or Medindie Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Medindie has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Medindie Gardens scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Medindie scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Medindie Gardens scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Medindie or Medindie Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Medindie Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
